regular_drinkers_total.description: Total number of 'regular drinkers' eligible for the follow-up survey in 1981–82.

re_interviewed.description: Number of regular drinkers successfully re-interviewed in the second survey.

non_respondents.description: Number of regular drinkers who were not re-interviewed in the second survey due to various reasons (untraceable, left region, refusal, illness, death).
